class.name: BTGoal
class.brief_description: Adds a single goal (unigoal) to the todo list and runs the planner.
class.description: Builds a unigoal from [member predicate], [member subject], and [member value] (or from blackboard [member goal_var] if set). Sets the todo list to that goal, runs [method PlannerPlan.find_plan], and on success writes the plan to the blackboard. Does not modify state directly; execution is via [BTExecutePlan].

members.member: Blackboard variable for goal (Array of predicate, subject, value); overrides the node properties if set.
